title: H2b TEMETTU-RUNUP re-test under D-207 corrected cost -- the edge-arastirma dividend pre-ex run-up, eliminated under FLAT cost, measured for the FIRST time with the corrected per-stock realistic cost -- Stage 0 pre-registration (FROZEN before results)
config_module: src/screening/d209_config.py (frozen MEASUREMENT geometry; decision/cost constants live in src/signals/thresholds.py D209_* + reused D205_*/D204_*/D203_*)
decision_owner: maintainer. The harness MEASURES + RECOMMENDS; it does NOT finalize deployment. Even a TRADEABLE-EDGE verdict makes H2b a deploy CANDIDATE at most (a separate maintainer decision). Deployment is NEVER auto-triggered.
what_this_is: D-209 re-runs the FROZEN edge-arastirma H2/H2b dividend pre-ex run-up signal (detection + book PORTED bit-for-bit from the edge-arastirma H2 lab; NO new definition, NO threshold re-pick) and changes ONLY the COST INPUT: the edge-arastirma FLAT 20/100bp-per-side cost (which eliminated H2b) is replaced by the D-207-corrected per-stock realistic cost (Roll+Kyle, EOD-quoted-primary). Two FROZEN edge-arastirma variants are reported (NO 'best' selected); the better one is the headline.
why: H2b was the SINGLE t>=2 candidate left in the edge-arastirma graveyard (0bp daily NW-t=2.57), but it was eliminated under a FLAT 20/100bp/side cost and was NEVER measured with the D-207-corrected per-stock cost. Now that NRR-010/D-207 corrected the inflated cost model (de-inflated ~12-25x on liquid names), H2b deserves the same fair-footing re-test hi52 got in D-208. This is the last clean measurement of H2b: still tradeable, or a significance wall like hi52?
honest_expectation: Declared BEFORE results, NO celebration expected. The frozen edge-arastirma h2b_runup_basket.json already shows the daily-relative NW-t at 20bp/side = 0.86 (ALL) / 1.16 (liquid). 20bp/side ~= 40bp round-trip ~= the D-207-corrected cost (~42bp, per D-208). So the corrected cost is in the same neighborhood as the 20bp/side column where H2b is ALREADY insignificant -> the PROBABLE verdict is YINE-TRADEABLE-DEGIL via a SIGNIFICANCE wall (an hi52 twin), NOT a cost wall. If a variant unexpectedly clears NW|t|>=2 after cost, that is a genuine surprise and is reported openly. Either outcome is recorded. Valuable because it is cheap and closes a graveyard gap.
candidate_N_note: H2b's first OFFICIAL Yol-1 measurement (count = 1 of N<=3). The edge-arastirma FLAT-cost elimination was a LAB result, not a Yol-1 official round. D-209 is the official re-test on the committed engine under corrected cost. N<=3 SON: if YINE-TRADEABLE-DEGIL, H2b is clean-archived; NO 4th round.

the_only_difference_FROZEN.demo_goal_cost_FLAT: V1 run_book: drag[t] = cost_turn[t] * (bp/1e4) where cost_turn[t] = (n_enter+n_exit)/max(n_held,1) and bp is PER-SIDE (a round trip = 2*bp/1e4). V2 tradeable: netmean(a,bp) = mean(a - 2*bp/1e4) (one FLAT round-trip per event). Grid [0,20,100] bp/side.
the_only_difference_FROZEN.d209_cost_corrected_D207: FLAT replaced by the per-name round-trip rt[sym] (D-207 quoted-primary): every entry OR exit charges a ONE-WAY 0.5*rt[sym]; a full round trip costs rt[sym]. The frozen turnover STRUCTURE (enter/exit bodies, /n_held for V1; one round-trip per event for V2) is preserved verbatim -- ONLY the per-name cost RATE changes. REDUCTION GUARANTEE: when rt is uniform == 2*bp/1e4 the per-name drag equals the frozen FLAT drag EXACTLY (asserted by tests/test_d209_h2b_runup.py).
the_only_difference_FROZEN.everything_else_IDENTICAL: ex-date detection (tr_index_gross.pct - adjusted_close.pct > 0.005), the [-5,-1] (V1) and [-10,-1] (V2) windows, exit-before-ex (no dividend, no 15% tax), the EW_FULL market benchmark, the invested-day market-RELATIVE primary metric (carry-immune), NW lag 5 (V1), the regime split 2022-01-01, the frozen D-202 panel.

detection.rule: ex-date where tr_index_gross.pct_change() - adjusted_close.pct_change() > D209_EX_GAP_MIN (0.005), per symbol; est_div_yield = that gap. PORTED bit-for-bit from the edge-arastirma H2 lab.
detection.reproduction_guard: On the frozen local build panel this reproduces ~1108 events / 265 symbols (edge-arastirma H2 lab figure). The engine RAISES if the count falls outside [900,1300] events / [220,300] symbols (detection must not drift).

V1_daily_churn.rule: EW long-only daily book; a name is HELD on day t iff its ex-date is in [t+1, t+5]; exit before ex. drag (per-name) on enter/exit. PRIMARY = invested-day (strat_net - EW_FULL) arithmetic series. NW HAC t, lag = 5.
V1_daily_churn.significance_metric: Newey-West |t| (lag 5) on the after-cost daily relative series.

V2_discrete_capture.source: edge-arastirma H2 lab tradeable() 'RUNUP_capture' leg BIREBIR
V2_discrete_capture.rule: per (symbol, ex) event ONE round-trip: compound return over [-10,-1] (10 trading days = 'hold-10g'), EW-combined per ex-month, exit before ex, add_div=False (no dividend captured -> no tax). The per-event FLAT 2*bp is replaced by the per-event rt[sym] (evaluated at the entry day pos-10). rel = (1+g)/(1+bm)-1 vs the EW market over the SAME window.
V2_discrete_capture.significance_metric: simple t on the monthly cohort after-cost relative series (the frozen significance metric for this aggregated leg; the daily NW-lag-5 estimator does not apply to a monthly cohort series).
V2_discrete_capture.interpretation_note: The directive's 'discrete-capture (hold-10g)' is interpreted as the FROZEN edge-arastirma RUNUP_capture leg ([-10,-1], 10-day hold, one round-trip per event, exit before ex). This is a faithful frozen-signal reading -- NOT a 'hold 10 days AFTER ex' (which would cross the ex-date, capture the dividend + 15% tax, and reverse the thesis). The interpretation is declared here, frozen before results.

liquid_universe_FROZEN_REUSE_D205.definition: A name is liquid at its ex-date iff its trailing-63d-median daily traded value (value_tl) >= 1e7 TL. ABSOLUTE threshold (NOT a tercile), per the directive '>=1e7 ADV, D-205-esik'. Both an ALL-events and a LIQUID-events book are reported for V1 and V2.
liquid_universe_FROZEN_REUSE_D205.look_ahead_safe: trailing median up to and including the ex-date; never forward.

cost_geometry_CORRECTED_D207_REUSE.model: Per-stock round-trip = 2*(one-way HALF-spread + Kyle one-way impact) + commission(0). Spread source per (date,name): EOD quoted half-spread (observed, vol-robust) -> 252d-Roll/2 fallback -> re-scaled D207 tier half-spread. The committed src/screening/realistic_cost.py + d204_hi52_stress.per_stock_cost_panel (post-D-207) is REUSED as-is; the quoted panel is INJECTED.
cost_geometry_CORRECTED_D207_REUSE.quoted_panel: Built locally by src/screening/quoted_spread.load_or_build_quoted_panel over the event symbols, window=D207_QUOTED_WINDOW(63), min_coverage=D207_QUOTED_MIN_COVERAGE(21). INJECTED (archive never enters CI).
cost_geometry_CORRECTED_D207_REUSE.note: lambda_kyle / order_value / windows are FROZEN at the D-204/D-207 values; calibration = optimization = FORBIDDEN. The cost CHANGE is purely FLAT -> D-207 per-name, NOT a re-tune.

keep_bar_FROZEN.rule: Per variant: cost-after relative mean > 0 AND |t| >= 2 (V1 = NW lag 5; V2 = simple t) AND regime sign-stable (2022-01-01 split, same sign both sides) AND survives in the liquid universe (liquid-subset cost-after relative mean > 0 AND |t| >= 2).
keep_bar_FROZEN.rationale: Identical in spirit to the edge-arastirma STAGE0_H2b keep-bar (rel net > 0 AND NW|t|>=2 AND regime sign-stable AND survives liquid). The liquid-survival leg is what makes it retail-tradeable; an illiquid-only edge is not deployable.

verdict_rule_FROZEN_2way.TRADEABLE_EDGE: EITHER frozen variant (V1 or V2) clears the FULL keep-bar on its frozen significance metric -> H2b's first deployable Yol-1 FORM (a deploy CANDIDATE; deploy is a separate maintainer decision, NOT auto-triggered). The better variant is the headline.
verdict_rule_FROZEN_2way.YINE_TRADEABLE_DEGIL: Neither variant clears the keep-bar -> H2b is NOT tradeable on a fair (corrected-cost) footing -> clean closure, temiz-arsiv. Distinguish in the report whether the wall is SIGNIFICANCE (|t| < 2 even after cost; the expected case) or COST (rel turns negative only after cost).
verdict_rule_FROZEN_2way.no_post_hoc_relaxation: No threshold, gate, signal, window, or universe is loosened. The ONLY change vs the edge-arastirma lab is swapping the FLAT cost for the D-207-corrected per-name cost.

constraints.measurement_only: Optimization FORBIDDEN; grid-sweep FORBIDDEN (p-hacking). Stage-0 frozen BEFORE results.
constraints.look_ahead_safe: Positions are established 1..10 trading days BEFORE the ex-date and exited before ex; the liquid filter and cost use only trailing data.
constraints.committed_engine_zero_touch: d203/d204/d205 engines + realistic_cost + thresholds existing blocks are READ-ONLY; D-209 only ADDS the D209_* threshold block and new d209_* files.
constraints.strangler: Frozen edge-arastirma detection/book PORTED (bit-for-bit, reproduction-guarded); D-207 cost engine REUSED.

price.source: D-202 (reused from D-203/204/205); carries tr_index_gross + adjusted_close so ex-date detection reproduces locally

quoted_spread_archive.note: EOD best bid/ask source for the quoted panel; LOCAL only, NOT in CI

quoted_spread_cache.note: cached [date x symbol] proportional quoted-spread panel; gitignored

outputs: docs/yol1/d209_results.json (after run: V1/V2 x ALL/LIQUID -- invested-days, concurrency, gross/net relative mean, t, realized round-trip bps, breakeven, turnover, regime split, + the 2-way verdict; LOCALLY generated, committed as an artifact since the parquets are CI-absent)
docs/research/D-209-rapor.md (measurement + two variants + cost + regime + HUKUM; OOS/honesty explicit) + docs/RESEARCH_REGISTRY.md line
